title: T-Deck: implement lilygo_tdeck_keyboard Zephyr driver for I2C keyboard at 0x55
description: Create driver in lichen/drivers/input/lilygo_tdeck_keyboard/ or similar. Support key matrix or scan via I2C. Register as input device. Follow Zephyr input driver patterns (see existing gpio-keys). Must pass all test vectors from Renode stubs and real hardware. Add to Kconfig and DTS binding.
